CreateAppBlbIpGroupMember.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
CreateAppBlbIpGroupMember.ipGroupId: Identifier of the associated IP group
CreateAppBlbIpGroupMember.memberList.memberId: Identifier of the IP group member
CreateAppBlbIpGroupMember.memberList.portList: List of ports exposed by the IP group member
